main.content:
{{SF6-Version |version=[[Street Fighter 6/Version/2.0301|2.0301]] |gameversion=2.0301 |date=May 28, 2026 |summary='''Ingrid Release'''. Minor system changes and bug fixes. |links=[https://www.streetfighter.com/6/buckler/battle_change/20260528 Patch Notes] }} == Ingrid Patch == * Ingrid released
== '''Universal Changes''' == * '''{{clr|DR|Wakeup Drive Reversal}}''' ** When the invincible startup interacts with an opponent's Throw hitbox, a 12f screen freeze now occurs and refunds {{clr|DR|1 Drive bar}} on hit ** This does not prevent Burnout from occurring before the meter is gained, but it makes {{clr|DR|Drive Reversal}} a more cost-effective defensive tool against throw loops ** As an unintended consequence, the screen freeze affects Kimberly's spraycan setups, causing the opponent's {{clr|DR|Wakeup Drive Reversal}} to be punishable if she attempts a throw * '''{{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} Throws''' ** The opponent no longer gains double the usual amount of {{clr|SA|Super Gauge}} (no change to attacker's meter gain) ** This makes {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} Throws a more desirable option to finish a round while building meter without also benefiting the opponent * '''Throw Escapes''' ** Defender's Drive Gain reduced 10000 → 5000 ** Defender's Super Gain reduced 1000 → 0 * '''{{clr|SA|Super}} Projectile Clashes''' ** Changed the behavior of clashing multi-hit projectile {{clr|SA|Supers}} to ensure consistent results * '''{{clr|SA|Super Art}} Command Inputs''' ** Fixed issue where holding a specific direction would cause some {{clr|SA|Supers}} not to be performed ** Affected {{clr|SA|Supers}}: *** Akuma {{clr|SA|SA2}} (Modern + Manual, while holding Up) *** C. Viper {{clr|SA|SA1}} (Modern + Manual, while holding Down or Back) *** Chun-Li {{clr|SA|SA1/SA2/SA3}} (Modern + Manual, while holding Up) *** Ed {{clr|SA|SA3}} (Classic, while holding Back) *** Mai {{clr|SA|SA1/SA2/SA3}} (Modern + Manual, while holding Up) *** Ryu {{clr|SA|SA2}} (Modern + Manual, while holding Up or Down)
== '''Character Changes''' == === '''Alex''' === * {{clr|M|Assist Combo 2}} ** Fixed issue where input buffer would be disabled after the 2nd hit was blocked when attempting to use another {{clr|M|Assist Combo 2}} ** Input buffer for the 2nd hit shifted from frame 2 → 7 * {{clr|H|Twisted Drop}} (Modern Controls: {{clr|L|2L}}~{{clr|H|2H}}) ** Fixed issue where 2nd attack would not be performed while holding the Assist button * {{clr|M|Palm Strikes}} (Modern Controls: {{clr|M|5M}}~{{clr|M|M}}) ** Fixed issue where 2nd attack would not be performed while holding the Assist button * Dangerous Armbar (Modern Controls: 2{{clr|M|M}}{{clr|H|H}}~2{{clr|L|L}}{{clr|M|M}}) ** Fixed issue where immediate scaling was unintentionally applied when using the Throw button instead of {{clr|L|L}}{{clr|M|M}} * Hyper Takedown (2PP~2{{clr|L|LPLK}}) ** 20% Immediate scaling added to match other normal throws
=== '''C. Viper''' === * {{clr|H|Assist Combo 3}} ** Fixed issue where the input buffer for the 2nd attack was faster than expected during the 1st hit
=== '''Chun-Li''' === * {{clr|M|Snake Strike}} (Modern Controls: 214X~{{clr|M|5M}}) ** Fixed issue where the {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} state was extended by 1 frame when holding Up after being Perfect Parries
=== '''Dhalsim''' === * Aerial Yoga Teleport Forward (j.6PPP) ** Fixed issue where Dhalsim could appear behind the opponent facing the wrong direction if both players were cornered
=== '''Ed''' === * {{clr|H|Low Smash Combination}} ({{clr|H|2HK}}~{{clr|H|HP}}) ** Startup of 2nd hit reduced 12 → 10 ** Total animation decreased 35 → 33 ** This causes the Target Combo to always be a true blockstring even when delayed (can no longer frame trap the opponent's attempted {{clr|H|2HK}} punish) * {{clr|OD|OD Psycho Shoot}} ({{clr|OD|236PP}}~6P) ** Fixed issue where the projectile clash from {{clr|OD|OD Psycho Spark}} could remain after shooting the projectile
=== '''Elena''' === * {{clr|M|Starling Beak}} (Modern Controls: {{clr|M|5M}}~{{clr|M|M}}) ** Fixed issue where 2nd attack would not be performed while holding the Assist button
=== '''Guile''' === * {{clr|OD|OD Sonic Blade}} ({{clr|OD|214PP}}) ** Fixed issue where the {{clr|L|L}}+{{clr|M|M}} and {{clr|M|M}}+{{clr|H|H}} versions would not come out with a negative edge (button release) input
=== '''Jamie''' === * {{clr|M|Full Moon Kick}} ({{clr|M|6MK}}~{{clr|M|MK}}) ** Increased forward movement and expanded the attack hitbox and proximity guard hitbox of the 2nd hit *** This makes it easier for the 2nd attack to connect at more ranges (after the patch that increased the pushback of blocked overheads) ** Reduced pushback on hit/block for the 2nd attack to pull the opponent closer to Jamie
=== '''JP''' === * {{clr|SA|SA3}} ({{clr|SA|236236K}}) ** Fixed issue where the attack could whiff through opponents that were moving forward quickly
=== '''Juri''' === * {{clr|M|Senkai Kick}} ({{clr|M|6MK}}) ** Increased pushback on block to ensure Juri is always out of throw range after {{clr|DR|DR~}}{{clr|M|6MK}}
=== '''Kimberly''' === * {{clr|SA|SA1}} ({{clr|SA|236236K}}) ** Fixed issue where it was difficult to Back Rise after being hit by the 0-can version
=== '''Mai''' === * {{clr|H|Hien Ren Kyaku}} (Modern Controls: {{clr|L|5L}}~{{clr|L|L}}~{{clr|L|L}}) ** Fixed issue where 2nd/3rd attacks would not be performed while holding the Assist button * {{clr|H|Hoshi Kujaku}} (Modern Controls: {{clr|H|4H}}~{{clr|H|H}}) ** Fixed issue where 2nd attack would not be performed while holding the Assist button
=== '''Marisa''' === * {{clr|H|Malleus Breaker}} ({{clr|H|3HP}}~{{clr|H|3HP}}) ** Increased forward movement and expanded the attack hitbox and proximity guard hitbox of the 2nd hit (and expanded the hurtbox to match this new range) ** This fixes the unintended issue where the 2nd hit would whiff after a blocked {{clr|H|3HP}} as a result of the patch that increased the pushback of blocked overheads
=== '''Sagat''' === * {{clr|OD|OD Low Tiger Shot}} ({{clr|OD|236}}{{clr|L|LP}}{{clr|M|MP}} or {{clr|OD|236}}{{clr|L|LP}}{{clr|H|HP}}) ** Fixed issue where inputting {{clr|OD|236}}{{clr|L|LP}}{{clr|M|MP}} while holding down the {{clr|H|HP}} button would result in a {{clr|M|MP High Tiger Shot}}
